CREATE TABLE test_printf (id UInt32, name String, year Int32);
SELECT printf('ID: %d, Name: %s, Year: %d', id, name, year) FROM test_printf;
CREATE TABLE example_data (value1 String, value2 String);
SELECT printf('Combining: %s and %s', value1, value2) FROM example_data;
SELECT printf('Multiple params: %s %s', (SELECT name FROM test_printf WHERE id = 1), (SELECT name FROM test_printf WHERE id = 2));
SELECT printf('Year: %d', (SELECT max(year) FROM test_printf WHERE year > 2023));
SELECT printf('Count: %d', (SELECT count(*) FROM test_printf WHERE year < 2025));
SELECT printf('Literal with escape: %%value%% is now formatted to %s', 'formatted_string') AS formatted_result;
CREATE TABLE user_info (user_id UInt32, user_name String, user_age Int32);
SELECT printf('User %s is %d years old.', (SELECT user_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id = 1), (SELECT user_age FROM user_info WHERE user_id = 1));
SELECT printf('User count: %d', (SELECT count(*) FROM user_info));
SELECT printf('Join Output: %s & %s', (SELECT user_name FROM user_info WHERE user_id = 1), (SELECT name FROM test_printf WHERE id = 2));
